title: Pentameris horrida
taxonomy: Pentameris horrida is a species of plant in the grass family Poaceae. It is classified as a member of the genus Pentameris, which is a group of grasses that are native to southern Africa. The genus Pentameris is part of the larger subfamily Panicoideae. The plant's classification is further categorized under the family Poaceae and the kingdom Plantae. Pentameris horrida is a species of grass that is found in the wild in southern Africa.
